question: Will the Pittsburgh Pirates win the NL Central Division?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2025 MLB NL Central Division.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a team to win the NL Central Division based on the rules of the MLB, this market will immediately resolve to “No” for that team.

If the 2025 MLB season is permanently canceled or has not been completed by March 28, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

Official resolution will be based on the MLB's official standings, as published on MLB.com.
